name: function 1
func:
var i = `         STANDARD REPORT        

MACHINE ID          PN1503006389
MACHINE SN          PN1503006389

PRINT TIME   2023-08-23 17:09:14
BEGIN        2023-08-23 17:09:12
END          2023-08-23 17:09:14

OPERATOR ID                    1
OPERATOR MODE                MIX

DEPOSIT ID                      
CUSTOMER ID                     
DEPOSIT AMOUNT             30.00

CURRENCY                     ZAR

--------------------------------
 Counted Result:                
 DENOM         PCS      AMOUNT  
 ZAR 20     X    1  =        20 
 ZAR 10     X    1  =        10 

--------------------------------
 AMOUNT          2  =        30 

--------------------------------
 Sub Total:                  30 

--------------------------------
 Total Result:                  
 Coin                      0.00 

 Total           2  =     30.00 

--------------------------------









`.split(/\n/)
for (const iterator of i ){
    node.send({ payload: iterator + "\r"})
}
return null;

};
